name: Gas Station
items_start: Filler pipe to underground gas tank
hints: The gas station has pumps, a cashier's booth, and a filler pipe to the underground tank. You need gasoline for the jet fuel.
GO BOOTH to enter the cashier's area. The gas pumps dispense fuel. The filler pipe accesses the underground tank.
Use the hand pump with the filler pipe to get gasoline from the underground tank into a jug. GO BOOTH enters the cashier's booth (room 9). EAST returns to Main & Hickory.
START PUMP with the manual pump connected to the filler pipe to extract gasoline. You need a jug to collect it in.
notes: Gas station with pumps, cashier's booth, and underground tank filler pipe. Use the manual hand pump on the filler pipe to extract gasoline into a jug. GO BOOTH enters cashier's booth (room 9). EAST returns to Main & Hickory (room 3).
